name: golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev
title: golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev
summary: Functions to merge structs and maps in Go
description:
Functions to merge structs and maps in Go
Mergo is a set of helper functions to merge structs and maps in
the Go language.  It is useful for configuration default values,
avoiding messy if-statements in initialisation code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev because Functions to merge structs and maps in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-imdario-mergo-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
